title: Idhayam Unnai Theduthe Lyrics Naan Sigappu Manithan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Idhayam Unnai Theduthe
Singer: GV Prakash & Saindhavi
Music: GV Prakash
Movie: Naan sigappu manithan

Ven panju megaththil
en nenjai nee vaithai
penne un punnagaiyil, saaral naanadi.

Kannukkul veedondru
kattithaan vaitheyney
angae nee vandha pinne, kovil aanadhey

Idhayam unnai thaedudhey
uyirum unnai thaeedudhey
unnai thaedi odudhey
uyrin uyire..

Ninaivum unnai thaedudhey
nizhaum unnai thaedudhey
unnai thaedi odudhey
uyirn uyire,..

Adi penney, irandhaalum
un madiyil, kanmoodathaaney
odi vandhu uyir viduven.

Oru paarvai, nee paarthaal
adhu podhum, ippodhey
naan meendum mannil
uyirthezhuven.

Ven panju megaththil
en nenjai nee vaithai
penne un punnagaiyil, saaral naanadi.

Kannukkul veedondru
kattithaan vaitheyney
angae nee vandha pinne, kovil aanadhey

Iraivaa oru varam kodu
ivan endhan maganaagave.
dhinam dhorum mazha vidu
ohh thaayaagi thaalattave.

Engae nee sendraalum
en kaalgal eppodhum
un pinnethaan nadakkum
Oh.. aagaayam saaindhaalum
boologam oindhaalum
nam kadhaldhaan irukkum..

Ven panju megaththil
en nenjai nee vaithai
penne un punnagaiyil, saaral naanadi.

Kannukkul veedondru
kattithaan vaitheyney
angae nee vandha pinne, kovil aanadhey

Idhayam unnai thaedudhey
uyirum unnai thaeedudhey
unnai thaedi odudhey
uyrin uyire..

Adi penney, irandhaalum
un madiyil, kanmoodathaaney
odi vandhu uyir viduven.

Oru paarvai, nee paarthaal
adhu podhum, ippodhey
naan meendum mannil
uyirthezhuven.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the emotional connection between two lovers.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Naan Sigappu Manithan, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, emphasizing their emotional bond.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of GV Prakash Kumar and Saindhavi.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Idhayam Unnai Theduthe was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was the song released?

The song was released on March 13, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Idhayam Unnai Theduthe, the heartfelt lyrics and soothing melody create a romantic atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The song captures the essence of yearning and love, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments. As the characters in Naan Sigappu Manithan navigate their emotional journey, this track serves as a poignant reminder of their connection. The collaboration between GV Prakash Kumar and Saindhavi adds a unique charm, evoking a sense of nostalgia and warmth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Idhayam Unnai Theduthe is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With GV Prakash Kumar and Saindhavi lending their enchanting voices, this track from the movie Naan Sigappu Manithan resonates with deep emotions. The soulful composition by GV Prakash Kumar elevates the romantic vibe, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: You have captured my heart in the golden clouds, dear, with your smile, it's like a drizzle.
In my eyes, a home has been built, and when you come there, it feels like a temple.
My heart searches for you, my life seeks you, I chase after you, the life of my life.
My thoughts also search for you, my reality seeks you, I chase after you, the life of my life.
Oh dear, even if it's just for a moment in your embrace, I will come and give my life.
Just one glance from you is enough, and I will rise again in this world.
You have captured my heart in the golden clouds, dear, with your smile, it's like a drizzle.
In my eyes, a home has been built, and when you come there, it feels like a temple.
My heart searches for you, my life seeks you, I chase after you, the life of my life.
Oh dear, even if it's just for a moment in your embrace, I will come and give my life.
Just one glance from you is enough, and I will rise again in this world.
